features.name: FSM with localparam state encoding and attribute
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine using localparam values for state encoding with an FSM encoding attribute on the state register

features.name: FSM with default case in state transition
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine with a default case in the case statement for state transitions
features.snippet: always @(posedge strobe) case(state) STATE0: state <= STATE1; STATE1: state <= STATE2; STATE2: state <= STATE3; STATE3: state <= STATE0; default: state <= STATE0; endcase

features.name: FSM state register with explicit initialization
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine state register with explicit initialization to a localparam state value

features.name: FSM output assigned from state register
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine where outputs are directly assigned from the state register bits
features.snippet:
reg [3:0] state;
assign {coilA1, coilA2, coilB1, coilB2} = state;
